positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a celestial fox spirit (Huli Jing) amidst a swirling nebula. The fox has a graceful, stylized silhouette, rendered with flowing lines of cosmic energy. The background features deep indigo, violet, and teal gradients, punctuated by brilliant, glowing golden and cyan stellar dust clouds. Composition is centered, with the fox occupying the primary visual space, creating a striking, high-contrast silhouette effect against the luminous cosmic void. Art style is highly refined graphic design, incorporating Art Nouveau symmetry and clean modern vector aesthetics. The print must have solid color blocks and clear separations suitable for screen printing on fabric. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, symmetrical, perfect composition, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logos, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, cluttered background, low detail, solid color background, grayscale, photorealistic, 3d render
